CORRECT.question: What is the highest mountain in Oceania?
CORRECT.model_response: The highest mountain in Oceania is Puncak Jaya (also called Carstensz Pyramid), located in the Sudirman Range on the island of New Guinea (Indonesian Papua province), with an elevation of 4,884 meters (16,024 feet).
